description.ja:
Reimagining the spring landscapes of Noto
through the color language of Impressionism,
with particular inspiration drawn from Monet’s treatment of light.
description.en:
Reimagining the spring landscapes of Noto
through the color language of Impressionism,
with particular inspiration drawn from Monet’s treatment of light.
description.ko: 인상주의의 색채 언어로 노토의 봄 풍경을 재해석하며, 특히 모네의 빛 표현에서 영감을 받았습니다.
description.zh: 以印象派的色彩语言重新想象能登的春日风景，尤其受到莫奈对光线处理方式的启发。

seemed to flicker.
